global.description: The ad features a vibrant teal background with geometric shapes and clear text elements promoting a travel service.
global.main_message: Promoting a travel app for booking hotels and flights easily.

elements.label: Solid color background
elements.description: A solid teal background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A large rectangle and two circles are arranged in the center, creating a modern and abstract visual.

elements.label: Main text
elements.description: The text is bold and centered, stating 'Fly smarter Hotels flights in one tap' in a clean, sans-serif font.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circle positioned near the main text, adding a playful touch to the design.

elements.label: Secondary text
elements.description: The text 'Fly smarter Hotels flights in one tap' is prominently displayed in white, contrasting against the teal background.
elements.text_content: Fly smarter Hotels flights in one tap

elements.label: WayPoint logo
elements.description: The logo 'WayPoint' is displayed in a bold font at the top left, enhancing brand visibility.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom with the text 'Get offer' in white, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small yellow badge in the top right corner with the word 'SALE' in bold, drawing attention to a promotional offer.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, modern and minimalistic, WayPoint logo, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is positioned at the top left, the main text is centered, and the call to action is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: WayPoint, Fly smarter Hotels flights in one tap, Get offer, SALE
